list.title: Skills
list.subtitle: Reusable review instructions. Each skill is a directive your agents can include in their prompt.
list.emptyBody: A skill is a directive — a piece of guidance your agents can include in their prompt. Create one to start.
list.noMatchBody: Try clearing the search or adjusting the type filter.

delete.title: Delete skill?
delete.bodyN: Delete "{name}". Used by {count} agents. This will remove it from those agents and delete its history.

editor.loadErrorBody: The skill could not be loaded.
editor.createSubtitle: Describe what this skill checks and how an agent should use it.
editor.name: Name
editor.descriptionHint: Acts as the skill's interface — phrase it as a directive.

editor.unsavedBody: You have unsaved edits. Leave the page anyway?
